explanation: The user's instruction is to 'get a pot and wash it'. First, the robot must pick up the pot (using pot_0 as the object since no other pot is referenced in the state). It then needs to place the pot in a sink basin to wash it. To wash the pot, the faucet must be turned on and off. After washing, the pot is picked up again and placed back on a stable surface (countertop) to complete the task. The plan follows standard household procedures for washing a pot, ensuring the robot holds only one object at a time and places it appropriately.
